text: 43. Subcontractor shall install unit kitchen and bathroom undermount sinks. Sinks to be furnished and distributed to units  by  others  and  coordinated  with  plumbing  subcontractor.  Sink  templates  to  be  utilized  for  cut-outs  in countertops and templates will be provided by others. Sink cut-outs shall be completed in a controlled environment and not on-site. Subcontractor shall install silicone at exposed sink to countertop.  secure installation in accordance with manufacturer's recommendations and project specifica tions, and coordinating with plumbing and related trades to ensure proper fit and connection readiness; furnishing of sinks, faucets, and plumbing connections is excluded, and  any  damage  occurring  during  Subcontractor's  possession  or  installation  shall  be repaired  or  replaced  at Subcontractor's expense.
